title: cyathea khasyana
intro: Cyathea khasyana, also known as the Khasi fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizomes, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cyathea khasyana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the rhizomes are often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
